label: MEGA65: Send to Hardware
args: echo "Compiling for MEGA65..." && petcat -w65 -o "$ZED_DIRNAME/build.prg" "$ZED_FILE" && echo "Sending via Ethernet..." && etherload -r "$ZED_DIRNAME/build.prg" && echo "Done!"

label: MEGA65: Run in XEMU
args: echo "Compiling for XEMU..." && petcat -w65 -o "$ZED_DIRNAME/build.prg" "$ZED_FILE" && echo "Launching XEMU..." && xmega65 -prg "$ZED_DIRNAME/build.prg"
